message:
fix(consumer): prevent ack_floor from advancing past pending windows

Out-of-order acks could advance ack_floor past still-pending delivery
windows, causing CatchUp demand to permanently skip those sequences
after a nack.  Replace the naive max(floor, window.end()) with
advance_ack_floor() which only advances as far as the lowest pending
window allows.

Added regression test: out_of_order_ack_does_not_advance_floor_past_pending

Audit batch 403 (consumer.rs + explain.rs + cut.rs + ir.rs):
- consumer.rs (4607L): 1 MEDIUM FIXED (ack_floor), 2 MEDIUM noted
- explain.rs (1945L): SOUND
- cut.rs (3207L): SOUND
- ir.rs (3225L): SOUND

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
